compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect usage-aware throttling
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing project documentation to reflect the new usage-aware throttling system
**Why**: Ensures future agents and developers have accurate awareness of the orchestration throttle mechanism
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section (describe check-usage.sh and throttle tiers), dso-config.conf key reference (orchestration.max_agents), workflow-config-schema.json (add orchestration section with max_agents property), KNOWN-ISSUES.md (if relevant)
- OUT: Rule text changes (Story 5), skill consumer changes (Story 6)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md architecture section describes the check-usage.sh + agent-batch-lifecycle.sh throttle pipeline and the 3-tier protocol
  ← Satisfies: "CLAUDE.md rule #4... replaced with usage-aware throttling guidance"
- When this story is complete, workflow-config-schema.json includes an orchestration section with max_agents property (type, default, description)
  ← Satisfies: "orchestration.max_agents config key caps the upper bound"
- When this story is complete, dso-config.conf includes a commented example for orchestration.max_agents with documentation of valid values
  ← Satisfies: "orchestration.max_agents config key caps the upper bound"

## Considerations

- [Maintainability] Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for formatting

comments.body: Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md for documentation formatting, structure, and conventions.
comments.author: Claude
